features.worldbank.description.message: Access WDI, IDS, and microdata for 200+ countries with 1,600+ development indicators.

feature.imf.description.message: Financial statistics, economic outlook, balance of payments, and trade data.

feature.un.description.message: Trade statistics (Comtrade), SDG indicators, and demographic data.

feature.gso.description.message: Official statistics including GDP, CPI, industrial production, and provincial data.

feature.customs.description.message: Import/export data by commodity, partner country, and time period.

feature.stocks.description.message: VN-Index, HNX, UPCOM indices and sector analysis for Vietnam stocks.

highlights.subtitle.message: An economic and financial data platform standardized for research and teaching.

highlights.item1.desc.message: All data is cleaned and standardized into panel/time-series formats, ready for research and international publication.

highlights.item2.desc.message: A multi-domain, multi-source repository, regularly updated from official agencies and organizations.

highlights.item3.desc.message: Coverage of macro indicators from trusted sources: World Bank, IMF, ADB, UN, FRED, OECD, ILO...

highlights.item4.desc.message: GSO (Statistical Yearbook, socio-economic reports), Customs (import/export by commodity), surveys (PAPI, PCI, PAR, SIPAS, ICT) and VHLSS, VARHS, VES microdata.

econ.subtitle.message: Assess the practicality and feasibility of your research right away, through an end-to-end workflow from data preparation to exporting reproducible code.

econ.phase1.desc.message: Filter the data scope, select indicators, compute variables, clean the data and review descriptive statistics.

econ.phase2.desc.message: Build a proposed model and alternatives, estimate and test them, then run robustness checks and model selection.

econ.phase3.desc.message: Export results in the citation style you need: APA 7th, Chicago 8th, Harvard 2008, IEEE 2008 and MLA 7th.

econ.phase4.desc.message: Generate the complete code from indicator selection to report export, ready to run on Stata, R and Python.
